title: STOP pretending AI doesn’t Affect You
summary: David Ondrej argues that AI technology has pervasive effects on individuals regardless of their awareness or acknowledgment. The video challenges denial or avoidance regarding AI's influence on daily life and society.
writeup: David Ondrej argues that AI already shapes daily life and society whether or not individuals notice or accept it. The central claim is that awareness or acknowledgment does not determine exposure: the effects are pervasive regardless. The video pushes back against denial and avoidance, treating disengagement from AI as a posture that does not exempt anyone from its influence.
